'''Baftu''' was the leader of the [[Syndicat]] on [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]]. He was in league with [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Beju]], who had stripped his people of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], and was going to get some from Phindar to look like a hero to the people of [[Gala]].

Baftu initiated his droids to kill his assistant, [[Terra Derida]], after accusing her of stealing the Syndicat's treasury. Meanwhile, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] disguised himself as Prince Beju in order to expose the Syndicat's plans to the people of Phindar. When the people of Phindar got the chance to attack the Syndicat for their bacta back, [[Guerra Derida]] had Baftu jailed.
